body.title: Vetinari: meta-orchestrator device for the whole agent collective
body.result: VetinariDevice: factory ownership, health rollup, Akien escalation via channel; 13 tests; stale stub replaced
body.description:
Lord Vetinari — the Patrician of Ankh-Morpork — manages the whole city without anyone noticing. As a rack device, Vetinari is the meta-orchestrator: knows what every factory and agent is doing, holds the owner_id for factories that don't have a more specific owner, makes high-level resource allocation decisions, and reports to Akien.

Vetinari is the 'agentized owner slot' from T-factory-template — the agent that can own factories so humans don't need to manage every one directly. Initially Akien owns everything; Vetinari takes over progressively as trust is established via the provenance + trust scoring system.

Capabilities: factory lifecycle management (create/halt/retire), agent health rollup across the whole collective, resource reallocation (shift budget from idle factories to busy ones), escalation to Akien when something needs a human decision, cross-factory goal tracking.

Gated on: T-factory-template, T-provenance-trust-scoring, T-inference-budget-ledger, T-agent-kill-switch all shipping first.

**Affected files:** devices/vetinari/ (new), config/profiles/vetinari.yaml
**Design rules:** BaseDevice/BaseShim; Vetinari calls tools, does not contain systems; owner_id in factory specs resolves to comms://vetinari/ once this ships
**Scope boundary:** IN — factory ownership, health rollup, budget reallocation, Akien escalation; OUT — Igor cognition, per-agent internal decisions
**Completion criteria:** Vetinari can own a factory spec, receive its health rollup, and escalate to Akien when eval scores drop below threshold

**PA2.0 Layer 3 (Future Modeling):** Vetinari is the Layer 3 device in the Prescient Agents 2.0 architecture. Alejandro'''s coding factory pattern: receive project brief → generate tasks with impl details + test criteria → route to worker tier → proof of life → CI gate → manual QA. Concept: C-prescient-agents-pa20. Goal: G-factory-of-factories.

**Dependency:** T-pa20-palace-foundation (palace nodes G-factory-of-factories + C-prescient-agents-pa20 must exist before Vetinari references them).
